## Summary

- Add /dashboard route rendering session analytics
- Static HTML page generated from events.jsonl

## Test plan

- Akali Playwright run: login → view chart → click filter
- Screenshots captured at route-entry, post-filter-click, final state
- Per-screenshot observation narrative in QA report

## Changes

UI-involving deliverable: browser-rendered HTML dashboard for human visual inspection.

QA-Report: assessments/qa-reports/2026-04-27-dashboard-phase2-qa.md

Design-Spec: N/A — no Figma-Ref opt-in in this plan or upstream project scope.
Accessibility-Check: WCAG AA color contrast verified; keyboard navigation tested.
